description: Deed of release. Written by Hillel b. ʿEli (fl. 1066–1108 CE). Fragment (right side only). Written on parchment. Regarding a woman’s ketubba. Involves Ibrāhīm and Mev[orakh or Mevasser]. On verso a mirror image imprint of another document, probably a ketubba. AA/ASE
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
